mapper.select: SELECT item FROM logdb.item_create_log WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO logdb.item_create_log (item_id, code1, code2, item, date) VALUES (#{itemId}, #{code1}, #{code2}, #{item}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT item FROM logdb.item_create_log WHERE code1 = #{code1} AND code2 = #{code2} LIMIT 1
